global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and discount information against a blue background.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time discount on BoltCart.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo featuring the word 'BoltCart' in large, white letters against a blue background.

elements.label: Discount announcement
elements.description: Text displaying 'Up to 40% off' in a prominent, eye-catching font, colored white on a blue background.

elements.label: Weekend offer
elements.description: Smaller text stating 'Only this weekend' in a simple, readable font, positioned below the discount announcement.

elements.label: 30% off badge
elements.description: A circular badge with a bold '30%' in white, set against a blue background, indicating a specific discount.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more' in white, set against a blue background, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Top banner
elements.description: A thin, horizontal banner at the top of the ad, colored blue, adding visual structure to the layout.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the entire ad space, providing a cohesive backdrop for all elements.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend 30% Learn more

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline reading 'BoltCart' that dominates the top section of the ad, designed to grab attention.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline, discount information, and a call-to-action button at the bottom.
